compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD filtering in pre-commit-review-gate.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add 3 test functions to tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-review-gate.sh mirroring existing MERGE_HEAD tests:

1. test_review_gate_rebase_filters_incoming_only: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Set up REBASE_HEAD state by writing .git/REBASE_HEAD and .git/rebase-merge/onto with the onto ref. Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head (NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD — the implementation reads from the rebase state directory). Stage incoming-only files. Verify hook exits 0.

2. test_review_gate_rebase_keeps_worktree_files: Same setup, include file changed by worktree branch too. Verify hook enforces normally (exit non-zero).

3. test_review_gate_rebase_failsafe_missing_onto: REBASE_HEAD present but no onto file. Verify falls through to normal enforcement.

IMPORTANT: Each test must use its own mktemp -d with trap cleanup. Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head, NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD.

PREREQUISITE: Story 6f45-a206 must be merged first (provides the REBASE_HEAD pattern in pre-commit-test-gate.sh to mirror).

## TDD Requirement
All 3 tests FAIL (RED) — no REBASE_HEAD handling exists in pre-commit-review-gate.sh. Tests execute the hook and assert on exit codes.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-review-gate.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 3 new REBASE_HEAD test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_review_gate_rebase" tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-review-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'pre-commit-review-gate.*test_review_gate_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Tests must create BOTH .git/REBASE_HEAD AND .git/rebase-merge/orig-head. REBASE_HEAD is the detection signal (analogous to MERGE_HEAD at line 202), orig-head provides the pre-rebase branch tip for merge-base computation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Tests verified RED ✓ — 3 FAIL (rebase filtering absent), 15 PASS
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation done ✓ — 15 existing PASS, 3 new REBASE_HEAD tests FAIL (RED) as expected; .test-index marker verified
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check ACs ✓ — (1) 3 new test functions with test_review_gate_rebase prefix defined and invoked; (2) Each uses mktemp -d with _TEST_TMPDIRS trap; (3) Each writes .git/REBASE_HEAD AND .git/rebase-merge/orig-head (NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD); (4) .test-index RED marker added; (5) Tests assert on hook exit code (behavioral, not structural as the primary observable surface)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
